text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year. I'm counting on your support
this year as well.
choice_data_list:
Let's not waste any time and start this year
strong!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes, indeed.

We decide to watch footage of past races to
prepare for this year's Classic Triple Crown.

On the screen, we see Tokai Teio—a peppy,
self-confident Umamusume who idolizes Symboli
Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
No one can catch her! She's the undefeated Twin
Crown Champion, Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Her body is agile, and she has an indomitable will.
She had a great showing at the Satsuki Sho and
the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Everyone expects her to go undefeated and win
the Triple Crown!

Tokai Teio is on screen again, triumphantly
raising her hand in a peace sign.

Her graceful run across the turf had all the
spectators captivated.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
So it's powerful racers like her who run in the
Classic Triple Crown races.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Negative. Why would I be feeling any pressure
now?
choice_data_list: Because Tokai Teio is so good.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed she is, but that information is irrelevant to
me.

With that odd statement, Mihono Bourbon turns
back to the screen.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Processing venue atmosphere, racer speeds, and
match progression... Complete.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
With this knowledge regarding the Classic Triple
Crown, I can begin doing mental simulations.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
We will reach our objective through daily training
and further stamina enhancement.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes. One problem exists, however.
Mihono Bourbon's expression turns slightly sullen.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I don't fully understand your other order.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: To be a runner who "inspires courage in others."

Come to think of it, I do recall giving her that
"order" before.

The way you run inspires courage in others... I'm
so proud of you.

The way you run inspires courage in others... I'm
so proud of you.

...Continue to prove that hard work surpasses
talent.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I have updated my objectives.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
They now include the Twinkle Series, the Classic
Triple Crown, and showing the value of hard
work.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Although I acknowledged your order, this
concept of "courage" has not yet been entered
into my database.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, I also have no experience with
"inspiring others" or "being inspired" myself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Executing your order will prove difficult for as
long as I don't have sufficient understanding of
these sensations and experiences.

Although her face is expressionless, she still
seems somewhat downhearted.

I think for a moment about how I can cheer her
up.
choice_data_list: Let's watch something funny on TV.
Let's think of a new running technique.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. Searching for an area where
mochi can be produced.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There is a New Year's mochi-pounding
tournament in the shopping district today. We
can go there.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Ha! Yah! Ha! Yah!

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Staff
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You're pretty good at this!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I am confident in my physical
strength.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Would you care to try, Trainer? It's just the right
amount of exercise that makes one feel refreshed.

The words of praise raise Mihono Bourbon's
spirits as she continues to aggressively pound the
mochi.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. Switching to terrestrial
television.
Bip! Bzzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
An error has occurred. The television has turned
off.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Proposing a makeshift solution. Should I smack
the television?
Luckily, the TV starts working again.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, what was the meaning of that last joke?

Mihono Bourbon watches the witty one-liners with
intense concentration.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. I shall devise a new running
technique.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Since testing is essential for the technique to
work, let us move to the track.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
As an extra, I can also devise a name for the
technique.

We head for the track, where we work on
concocting and mastering a new technique until
sundown.

It seems like today's activities have helped clear
Mihono Bourbon's mind. I'm sure she'll come to
understand the meaning of courage soon enough.

After all, we're going to spend this year storming
through the Classics together!
